basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age limit as on 01 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Degree, Two wheeler driving license
qualification.details: Field Assistant: Any Degree, Male, Age: 21 to 40 years as on 01.05.2026, Two wheeler driving license. Preferred: Candidates with nativity of Anthiyur, Bargur hills, Kadambur hills and Erode districts, Experience in animal handling.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Field Assistant post at TANUVAS is scheduled for 18 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Field Assistant post is Any Degree. Additionally, candidates must possess a two-wheeler driving license.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Field Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Field Assistant position is between 21 years and 40 years as of 01 May 2026. No specific age relaxation details are provided.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Field Assistant position by TANUVAS.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Field Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Field Assistant recruitment at TANUVAS.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Field Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Assistant post involves a Written examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue located?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Erode, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 638501. The exact address will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any preferred qualifications for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with nativity of Anthiyur, Bargur hills, Kadambur hills, and Erode districts are preferred. Experience in animal handling is also a preferred qualification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. This includes ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.
